sectionOrderRules: Hero must state what kinds of rubber or plastic products the company manufactures and include a primary CTA.
Product summary should describe concrete product categories or component types, not vague claims.
Manufacturing summary must appear before the final CTA and should mention relevant materials, methods or production capabilities when available.
Trust proof should use real references, visible company details or documented experience and must not invent certifications or volumes.
Sections should distinguish products, processes and applications so the same message is not repeated.
Products intro must connect the company offering to actual manufactured items or component families.
Product list items must be concrete, such as seals, hoses, molded parts, profiles, packaging details or custom plastic components when supported by the dossier.
If pricing-table is used, it should present indicative structures or request-based pricing only when honest for the business.
A CTA to technical dialogue or quote request should follow the product list.
Manufacturing intro must explain how the company works from requirement to finished part or delivery.
Materials and processes should name actual materials or methods only when supported by the input.
Quality workflow must describe real checks, tolerances, testing, traceability or documentation practices if available, without implying formal certification unless provided.
This page should help a buyer evaluate fit, so process details should be more specific than the home page.
About story must be specific about the company, its production focus or customer collaboration, not generic branding copy.
Team should highlight relevant roles such as production, sales or technical support when data exists.
Trust proof may include references, organization number visibility and business facts, but must stay factual.
Contact page must provide real phone, email and address details when supplied.
Contact form should support quote or inquiry intent and allow the visitor to describe need, volume, drawing or material request in plain language.
Map and opening hours are optional enhancements and should appear after the core contact options.
